dialogue.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
dialogue.line: "Ethan, we got a hit on the encrypted data."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of SOFIA LAURENTA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ETHAN WOLFE
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Sofia, a determined look etched on her face.

dialogue.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
dialogue.line: "Belongs to a high-ranking executive from Omicron Innovations."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Ethan, his eyes narrowing in focus.

dialogue.speaker: ETHAN WOLFE
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of Sofia, her eyes scanning the room as she hands the folder to Ethan.

dialogue.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
dialogue.line: "I've got a bad feeling about this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of SOFIA LAURENTA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ETHAN WOLFE
dialogue.line: "We're just here to ask questions, Sof. Don't get your hackles up."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Sofia, a hint of unease in her voice.

dialogue.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
dialogue.line: "You know I've got a history with these people, Ethan."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Ethan, a confident stride as he leads Sofia towards the elevators.

dialogue.speaker: ETHAN WOLFE
dialogue.line: "Victor, we're not here to play games. Where is the encrypted data?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ETHAN WOLFE, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VICTOR MORRELL
dialogue.line: "I don't know what you're talking about."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Victor, his eyes darting between Ethan and Sofia.

dialogue.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
dialogue.line: "Don't lie to us, Victor. We have evidence."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Victor, his voice shaking slightly.

dialogue.speaker: VICTOR MORRELL
dialogue.line: "Fine... I'll tell you. But you have to protect me."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Sofia, her eyes narrowing in intensity.
